title: Living in Boulder vlog 7 - 20 - 2017: Bike Errands, Rode with mom

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder while sick, describing a day of bike-related errands: buying a handlebar bag, water bottle cages, lights, and a new microphone (Apogee) at the Apple Store, plus replacing broken glasses. He plans to ride with his mom later and mentions wanting to try Zwift for virtual cycling.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Excited about it — thinks riding virtually with others is amazing
Doesn't want bags under the seat so he has room for water access

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I just got a new microphone from the Apple store, the Apogee.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm testing the sound quality of the new microphone.

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to do a couple of strata statements but don't understand some of them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll include the strata statements in my daily routine.

claims.claim: I want to try Zwift when I can ride on a roller.

claims.claim: The Zwift piece is only $10.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not selling the Zwift piece; you need real diapers with other people.

claims.claim: I'm looking forward to testing the new microphone.

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-Log. This is my first V-Log with my new microphone that I just got at the Apple store, the Apogee.
So, we'll see how good the sound is. So I guess even when this thing is whirring, maybe if the Apogee picks it up,
I can put it over here and see how the sound sounds over here.
So, today, last night, see I haven't really started writing yet,
And so my physically, I just keep getting worse and worse.
Last night, I couldn't breathe. So, I was just laying in bed all night long, which caused me to sleep in today.
I didn't have to work today. I was useless in the beginning.
But then I got up and I went over and I got, what else?
I wanted to get accessories.
So, I got the top bag right behind the stem or the handlebar on the top there.
It can hold, like, five power bars and a gel.
And then I ordered the one that goes under.
And so, maybe later on, I'll get the one that hooks onto the frame on the back part.
So, then I can get three bags on there.
Because I don't want to put any bags on my, under my seat.
Because when I, if I go on, when I go on Enduro rides, I want to have water there.
So, yeah, maybe I should get a bigger seat for the back.
But anyway, then I went over and, oh, and got two more water bottle cages, $60 each.
Because I want to get the good ones.
Because I have a good bike.
And, what else did I get?
Lights.
Little lights to put in front of the back.
And, um, and to get this bolt for my, to hold, because I already had a water bottle holder for the back.
Behind the seat.
So, I went to the hardware store and got that.
And then I came back here and, and I found out I needed, yeah, this.
So, I went and got the microphone.
Just, like, buying things.
Um, and, um, it's just setting up my stuff, organizing.
Um, but I think I have everything.
I was going to go, oh, yeah, and I went to go replace my glasses.
Because I broke those.
I sat on them a few days ago.
Another 60 bucks.
But, um, um, I was, wait, I've been writing around.
For my mom to call me.
Because we're going to go on a ride.
I wanted to show her my bike.
And then after we go on a ride with her, if I still have daylight.
Or, yeah, I'd like to go out on a really quick ride.
Just to do a couple of Strava segments.
I want to do some Strava segments.
So, then I'll include them in my daily V-log.
My Strava segments.
So, um, yeah.
I want to get hooked up on Zwift, too.
And I can ride on the rollers.
I have to get that piece.
But, it's only 10 bucks a month.
So, you know, you can do real bike races with other people.
It's amazing.
And, like, your friends and stuff.
So, um, so, that's what I'm doing today.
Let's see how this thing sounds.
I'm looking forward to it.
Let's see.
Let's see.
Let's see.
